page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor. Running on a KVM hypervisor, this instance features 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz with a single thread per core configuration. It is equipped with 96.0 GB of system memory, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This server does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The absence of hyperthreading means each vCPU maps directly to a physical core, offering predictable compute performance without resource sharing at the core level.

Given its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the instance is classified as memory-optimized. This resource density makes it suitable for memory-intensive workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caching layers, and enterprise applications that require significant memory capacity relative to compute resources. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high memory density provide a stable environment for workloads where CPU thread contention must be avoided.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.3xlarge is a memory-optimized x86_64 server instance featuring 12 dedicated vCPUs and 12 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.4 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration and KVM virtualization, it delivers predictable compute performance. The instance is equipped with 96.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core memory-to-vCPU ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU resources, relying instead on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, such as database hosting, caching layers, and enterprise applications, where dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density are required to prevent resource contention.
